metric_notes: nDCG@k normalizes by IDCG@k with R = #gold-page tiles in THIS arm's index; content-aware chunking changes R for the same page, so nDCG@k is normalized per-arm and is NOT strictly comparable fixed-vs-content-aware. Use raw DCG@k (same rels + log discount, no per-arm normalization) and Recall@k for cross-arm comparison — both are arm-invariant.

cost.vision_token_formula: ceil(width/28) * ceil(height/28) per chunk, summed per page
